specific_question: In Q3, 2024, how did Elexion’s customer service team measure the effect of delivery delays on prospective EV buyers?
answer: Internal CRM logs show that 22% of new EV inquiries in Q3 2024 cited delayed delivery estimates as a concern, according to Elexion Automotive’s Customer Relationship Management dashboard.
dr_question: Based on the 2024 report "Trends in electric cars" on iea.org, how are competitor strategies and market positioning shaping the North American EV sector by Q2 2026?
